title.en: FLORA-9: The Pulse of Digital Nature

description.ko: 플로라-9은 유기적 생명체와 디지털 구조의 융합을 나타내며, 데이터 스트림과 생체 발광 회로를 통해 광합성이 이루어지는 미래의 생태계를 상징합니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 represents the fusion of organic life and digital architecture, where photosynthesis is powered by data streams and bioluminescent circuitry.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic shot of FLORA-9, a synthetic botanical organism featuring translucent crystalline petals embedded with glowing blue fiber-optic veins. The plant pulses with soft neon light amidst a dark, high-tech greenhouse environment. Holographic data streams swirl around the leaves, 8k resolution, macro photography, cyberpunk aesthetic, digital nature theme.
